meta.importedFrom: Unit 1 Passage 1 Poor in things, rich in love（互动课文教学动画）英语新教材外研版七年级下册.html

article.title: Poor in things, rich in love
article.summary: 从《查理和巧克力工厂》里的家庭故事，理解“贫穷但充满爱”的幸福感。

sentences.text: I put down Charlie and the Chocolate Factory.
sentences.tr: 我放下了《查理和巧克力工厂》这本书。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语
sentences.d: 'put down' 是动词短语，意为'放下'。书名作为宾语。

sentences.text: But I kept going over the exciting story in my mind.
sentences.tr: 但我脑海中不断回味着这个激动人心的故事。
sentences.g: 连词 + 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语 + 状语
sentences.d: 'keep doing sth' 表示'持续做某事'。'go over' 意为'复习、重温'。

sentences.text: The book was full of magic.
sentences.tr: 这本书充满了魔力。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: 'be full of' 是固定搭配，意为'充满...'。

sentences.text: But Charlie’s happy family was the most magical part of the story.
sentences.tr: 但查理幸福的家庭是故事中最神奇的部分。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: 'the most magical' 是形容词最高级形式，修饰 'part'。

sentences.text: Charlie’s home was a small house at the side of a big town.
sentences.tr: 查理的家是位于大城镇边缘的一座小房子。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语 + 地点状语
sentences.d: 'at the side of' 表示'在...旁边/边缘'。

sentences.text: His family was very poor.
sentences.tr: 他的家庭非常贫穷。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: 简单的主系表结构，描述家庭状况。

sentences.text: His four grandparents stayed in the only bed in the house.
sentences.tr: 他的四位祖父母挤在房子里唯一的一张床上。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 地点状语
sentences.d: 'the only' 强调唯一性。

sentences.text: The family never had enough food.
sentences.tr: 这家人从来没有足够的食物。
sentences.g: 主语 + 频度副词 + 谓语 + 宾语
sentences.d: 'enough' 修饰名词 'food'。

sentences.text: They always ate watery cabbage soup for dinner.
sentences.tr: 他们晚餐总是喝稀薄的卷心菜汤。
sentences.g: 主语 + 频度副词 + 谓语 + 宾语 + 目的状语
sentences.d: 'watery' 形容汤很稀，暗示贫穷。

sentences.text: In winter, the freezing wind swept across the floor all night long.
sentences.tr: 冬天，刺骨的寒风整夜扫过地板。
sentences.g: 时间状语 + 主语 + 谓语 + 地点状语 + 时间状语
sentences.d: 'swept' 是 'sweep' 的过去式。'all night long' 强调持续整夜。

sentences.text: To my surprise, the family were happy together.
sentences.tr: 令我惊讶的是，这家人在一起很幸福。
sentences.g: 插入语 + 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: 'To my surprise' 是常用插入语，表示'令我惊讶的是'。

sentences.text: In the evenings, Charlie sat with his grandparents in bed and listened to their stories.
sentences.tr: 晚上，查理和祖父母一起坐在床上听他们讲故事。
sentences.g: 时间状语 + 主语 + 并列谓语
sentences.d: 'sat' 和 'listened' 是并列谓语，描述连续动作。

sentences.text: Charlie’s parents often joined in.
sentences.tr: 查理的父母也经常加入进来。
sentences.g: 主语 + 频度副词 + 谓语
sentences.d: 'join in' 表示'参加、加入'。

sentences.text: Every night, the room became a happy place.
sentences.tr: 每天晚上，这个房间都变成了一个快乐的地方。
sentences.g: 时间状语 + 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: 'became' 是系动词，后接名词作表语。

sentences.text: The whole family forgot about their hungry and poor life.
sentences.tr: 全家人都忘记了他们饥饿和贫穷的生活。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语
sentences.d: 'forget about' 意为'忘记...，不再想...'。

sentences.text: This touched me greatly.
sentences.tr: 这深深地触动了我。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语 + 程度状语
sentences.d: 'greatly' 修饰动词 'touched'，表示程度之深。

sentences.text: In some people’s minds, happiness comes from things like money.
sentences.tr: 在一些人看来，幸福来自于金钱之类的东西。
sentences.g: 地点状语 + 主语 + 谓语 + 来源状语
sentences.d: 'come from' 表示'来自于'。

sentences.text: But love, in fact, is the key to happiness.
sentences.tr: 但事实上，爱才是幸福的关键。
sentences.g: 主语 + 插入语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: 'the key to...' 是固定搭配，意为'...的关键'。

sentences.text: Oscar Wilde once said, “Keep love in your heart. A life without it is like a sunless garden...”
sentences.tr: 奥斯卡·王尔德曾经说过：“心中要保留爱。没有爱的生活就像一个没有阳光的花园......”
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语（直接引语）
sentences.d: 引用名言来支持观点。'sunless' 由 'sun' + 后缀 'less' (无) 构成。

sentences.text: There are so many reasons to be happy.
sentences.tr: 有太多理由去快乐。
sentences.g: There be句型 + 不定式作定语
sentences.d: 'to be happy' 修饰 'reasons'。

sentences.text: I think love is the most important one.
sentences.tr: 我认为爱是最重要的一个。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语从句
sentences.d: 省略了引导词 'that' 的宾语从句。

sentences.text: It can move us, change us and give us a life full of happiness.
sentences.tr: 它能感动我们，改变我们，给我们一个充满幸福的生活。
sentences.g: 主语 + 情态动词 + 并列谓语
sentences.d: 'move', 'change', 'give' 是三个并列动词原形。

readingQuestions.stem: What kind of food did Charlie's family usually eat for dinner?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第二段提到：'They always ate watery cabbage soup for dinner.'（他们晚餐总是喝稀薄的卷心菜汤。）

readingQuestions.stem: According to the writer, what was the most magical part of the story?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第一段提到：'But Charlie’s happy family was the most magical part of the story.'（但查理幸福的家庭是故事中最神奇的部分。）

readingQuestions.stem: What does the writer think is the key to happiness?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章最后一段提到：'But love, in fact, is the key to happiness.'（但事实上，爱才是幸福的关键。）

readingQuestions.stem: Why did the room become a happy place every night?
options: A. Because they had a big dinner
B. Because they watched TV together
C. Because they shared stories and love
D. Because they won the lottery
readingQuestions.answer: C. Because they shared stories and love
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第三段描述了全家人聚在一起听祖父母讲故事，忘记了贫穷，充满了快乐。

readingQuestions.stem: What did Oscar Wilde say about a life without love?
options: A. It is like a dark room
B. It is like a sunless garden
C. It is like a cold winter
D. It is like a hungry life
readingQuestions.answer: B. It is like a sunless garden
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章引用了奥斯卡·王尔德的名言：'A life without it is like a sunless garden...'（没有爱的生活就像一个没有阳光的花园）。
